contract.terms: Fights with party through Wyvern Tor and Thundertree. Can raise dead from kills. Spellbook returned after Thundertree. Access to Forge of Spells at Wave Echo Cave.

Klarg's cave — orders to bring dwarf and map to King Grol at Cragmaw Castle

Glasstaff's desk — Forge of Spells, Wave Echo Cave intel
Old Owl Well — Thayan necromancy spells, held by Raistlin
Old Owl Well — notes on Netherese tower builders
Old Owl Well — extorted from Kost, +1 AC and saves, attuned by Raistlin
Old Owl Well — 50gp value from Kost

Venomfang's hoard — +1 magic weapon, max damage vs plants/wood, equipped by Dain

Grol's chest — intel on Black Spider
Gundren's pack — critical for finding the forge

party_inventory.note: Shared party items — not assigned to individual characters. Distributed as needed.

potions.name: Potion of Healing
potions.source: 3 from Klarg + 1 from Glasstaff + 3 from Sister Garaele (Agatha quest reward collected)

scrolls.name: Scroll of Planar Convergence
scrolls.effect: Teleport entire party up to 50 miles or between planes

pending_identification.name: Ring (silver, runes)
pending_identification.note: Raistlin to cast Identify — likely magical (Drow mage's ring)

returned_items.name: Kost's spellbook
returned_items.note: Returned per contract terms after Thundertree completion

sold_items.note: Magic weapon from Drow mage — sold
Raistlin already has Misty Step in spellbook
All 6 spells copied first: Darkness, Invisibility, Counterspell, Cone of Cold, Telekinesis, Feeblemind (750gp copy cost). 3 Counterspell scrolls crafted via Forge (750gp). Net: +3500gp after costs.

quests.name: Deliver Supplies to Phandalin
quests.objective: Bring wagon of provisions to Barthen's Provisions in Phandalin

quests.name: Rescue Gundren Rockseeker
quests.objective: Find Cragmaw Castle and rescue Gundren — he has a map to Wave Echo Cave. King Grol has him. The Black Spider is behind it.
quests.reward: Sildar will pay the party well
quests.resolution: Rescued from Cragmaw Castle, subdued King Grol and drow agent

quests.name: Escort Sildar to Phandalin
quests.objective: Bring Sildar Hallwinter safely to Phandalin

quests.name: Find Iarno Albrek
quests.objective: Sildar is looking for Iarno Albrek, a Lords' Alliance agent who disappeared near Phandalin two months ago
quests.resolution: Iarno Albrek IS Glasstaff — captured alive at Redbrand hideout. Turned over to Sildar.

quests.name: Return Lionshield Coster Supplies
quests.objective: Return stolen supplies to Linene Graywind at the Lionshield Coster trading post

quests.name: Deal with the Redbrands
quests.objective: Clear the Redbrand gang from Phandalin. Leader is Glasstaff, hideout under Tresendar Manor. Secret tunnel entrance south of manor.

quests.name: Rescue Dendrar Family
quests.objective: Thel Dendrar was murdered by Redbrands. His wife Mirna and children are missing — likely held in the hideout.
quests.reward: Emerald necklace location — herb shop in Thundertree

quests.name: Agatha's Bargain
quests.objective: Bring Sister Garaele's silver comb to the banshee Agatha near Conyberry. Ask about Bowgentle's spellbook location. DO NOT fight her.
quests.resolution: Agatha answered: Bowgentle's spellbook was traded to necromancer Tsernoth in Iriaebor, 100+ years ago. Potions to collect from Garaele on return.

quests.name: Old Owl Well
quests.objective: Investigate undead activity at the Old Owl Well ruins northeast of Phandalin. A necromancer named Hamun Kost may be responsible.
quests.resolution: Kost captured alive (Bron crit KO). 12 zombies destroyed via Turn Undead + radiant damage. Kost's tent looted: spellbook, pearl, gold, 2 scrolls, journal.

quests.name: Wyvern Tor
quests.objective: Drive off the orc band camped at Wyvern Tor in the eastern foothills.
quests.resolution: All 6 orcs + ogre killed. Caltrops+oil trap at entrance, surprise round. Bron took 9 damage from Brughor (healed). Kost raising all 7 as zombies. 100gp to collect from Harbin on return.

quests.name: Find Reidoth the Druid
quests.objective: Locate Reidoth in Thundertree. He knows where Cragmaw Castle is.
quests.resolution: Found in Thundertree. Provided locations of Cragmaw Castle (NW in Neverwinter Wood) and Wave Echo Cave (SE in hills). Intel: King Grol (bugbear) leads Cragmaw, Black Spider (Nezznar, drow) has agents inside, Grol and Nezznar don't trust each other.

quests.name: Emerald Necklace
quests.objective: Retrieve Mirna Dendrar's family heirloom from the ruined herb shop in Thundertree.
quests.resolution: Retrieved from ruined herb shop in Thundertree.

session_notes: Ch1: complete. Ch2: complete (Redbrands cleared, Glasstaff captured, Dendrars freed). Ch3 Act I (session 3): Phandalin quest pickup — Halia (200gp for letter copies, Zhentarim contact), Garaele (Agatha quest), Daran (Old Owl Well), Harbin (Wyvern Tor), Qelline (Reidoth at Thundertree). Sold loot 46gp. Sildar paid 200gp for Iarno. Route: Conyberry > Old Owl Well > Wyvern Tor > Thundertree > Cragmaw. Agatha: Sweeney presented comb, learned Bowgentle's spellbook traded to Tsernoth in Iriaebor (3 potions to collect on return). Old Owl Well: Turn Undead scattered 12 zombies, Bron crit KO'd Kost in surprise round (25 non-lethal). Zombies destroyed with radiant. Loot: Ring of Protection, pearl (100gp), 2 scrolls (Blindness/Deafness, Misty Step), Kost's spellbook+journal, 35gp. Kost recruited as NPC ally — contract: fights through Thundertree, can raise dead, gets spellbook back + Forge of Spells access. Kost intel: Cragmaw Castle NW in Neverwinter Wood, Venomfang at Thundertree, orcs at Wyvern Tor. Dragon plan: zombie screen + surprise alpha strike. 0 HP lost, Dain 2 spell slots used (smite), Dain+Sweeney Channel Divinity used. XP: 690/pc. Thundertree: killed Venomfang in 1 surprise round (0 damage taken). Bron Portent crit 46dmg, Ala Assassinate crit 32dmg, Dain Smite 30dmg, Honu Trip Attack prone, Raistlin Shatter 12dmg, Sweeney Guiding Bolt kill. Hoard: Dragonguard (Sweeney), Hew +1 battleaxe (Dain), Scroll of Lightning Bolt, 150gp+800sp+290gp gems/goblets. Reidoth: Cragmaw Castle NW Neverwinter Wood (King Grol bugbear + Black Spider agents, Grol/Nezznar distrust), Wave Echo Cave SE. Emerald necklace retrieved. XP 1233/pc. Cragmaw Castle: infiltrated via north breach, subdued Grol and drow agent in surprise round (Web restrain → Ala/Sweeney non-lethal). Rescued Gundren. Loot: Dagger +1, Potion of Hill Giant Strength, Potion of Invisibility, Drow spellbook, 350gp, jade statue 75gp, Wave Echo Cave map (critical). Prisoners: Grol and drow agent. Next: Wave Echo Cave (SE in hills) for Forge of Spells.

right_path: glasstaff_quarters (Iarno Albrek, wizard, secret escape door behind bookcase)

hideout_intel.glasstaff_escape_route: hidden door behind bookcase in study

venomfang_alpha_strike.target: Young Green Dragon — Venomfang (AC 18, 136 HP, flees at 68)
venomfang_alpha_strike.strategy: Zombie screen alpha strike. Surprise round — party hidden, zombies charge WITH party as body shield. Dragon can't act Round 1. Round 2 dragon breaths on zombie cluster, not PCs. Spread positioning, maximize damage.
pre_combat: Sweeney: Aid on Raistlin, Ala, Sweeney (+5 max HP each)
Dain: Bless on Bron, Honu, Dain (+1d4 attacks/saves)
Ala scouts tower, party hides in spread ambush positions
Zombies line up as body shield — charge simultaneously with party
Scroll of Augury: weal/woe check before committing

round_1_surprise.Bron: Charge + Action Surge (3 attacks, Bless, crit 19-20) — ~30 damage
round_1_surprise.Dain: Vow of Enmity + Warhammer + Divine Smite + Hunter's Mark — ~22 damage
round_1_surprise.Honu: Trip Attack + longsword (Bless) — ~12 damage, prone if STR save fails
round_1_surprise.Raistlin: Shatter 2nd level (3d8) or hold Web for Round 2 — ~13 damage
round_1_surprise.Sweeney: Guiding Bolt (4d6 + advantage to next attack) — ~14 damage
round_1_surprise.Zombies: Slam attacks, cluster on dragon — ~8 damage

venomfang_alpha_strike.expected_damage_round_1: ~137 (expected) — exceeds 136 HP total, guarantees 68 HP flee threshold

round_2_if_needed.dragon_action: Breath weapon on zombie cluster (not PCs — spread formation)
round_2_if_needed.party: Full attacks + Spiritual Weapon (bonus action 1d8+4) — ~80 more damage
round_2_if_needed.contingency_web: If dragon tries to fly, Raistlin Web — restrained, speed 0, advantage on attacks
round_2_if_needed.contingency_trip: Honu Trip Attack — prone, can't fly, melee advantage

key_resources: Portent (guarantee key hit or force dragon to fail save)
Scroll of Blindness/Deafness (CON save or blinded — backup)
Absorb Elements (Raistlin halves breath, +damage next attack)
Staff of Defense Shield charges (Raistlin AC 24 for 1 round)
Ring of Protection (Raistlin +1 AC and saves, attuned)
Aid (+5 HP to Raistlin 29, Ala 41, Sweeney 41)
risks: Stealth check — dragon passive Perception 14. Heavy armor PCs need Portent backup
Breath on PCs if dragon ignores zombies — 42 avg, Raistlin dies without Absorb Elements
Dragon flies out of melee — Web or Trip Attack needed to ground it
Frightful Presence DC 14 WIS — decide on the fly
venomfang_alpha_strike.zombie_value: Body shield + breath sponge. Dragon wastes its best attack on dead meat. 6-7 zombies absorb one full breath.

scaling.note: All encounters scaled for 6 PCs vs module default of 4
